lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Inara — Powerplay
sources.what: Controlled-system bounty bonuses, RES/CZ venues, bond turn-ins, engineer unlocks, and module sellers.

sources.label: Fandom — Ranks
sources.what: Combat-rank ladder (Harmless → Elite) and progression thresholds.

sources.label: Fandom — Conflict Zone
sources.what: CZ tiers, spec-ops/captain mechanics, and combat-bond payouts.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Module variants and engineering blueprint data behind the build references.
